name: Tropical Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Mango, halved and cut along the pit, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Papaya, halved, seeds removed, cut into wedges, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Asian Pear, quartered, cored peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Kiwi, quartered and peeled, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mango, papaya, Asian pear and kiwi in a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon and toss to coat.
3. Let stand at room temperature until ready to serve.
